response.overview: A group of travelers desperately struggles to tackling an interprovincial collective car which will transport them from a nearby coast city to Lima the capital. Passengers unknow that, fulfilling their destiny, this journey will lead them to the encounter with death.  An angel, who has adopted the personality of a frail elder, upon detecting the presence of The Widow (angel of death) that roams around, manages to embark on the vehicle to offer the Passengers a chance of salvation. The unbearable Passengers, rude and insensitive, will not take advantage of the strange saving option that the old man offers them, and behaving badly they will be deserving of their fatal destiny. Only Justino, an ordinary provincial lawyer, who has shown some sensitivity, in defending the old man from the aggression of the other passengers, will reach his salvation, albeit in a strange way.
response.title: Camino Privado
